title: TetraMem-XL: A Tetrahedron-Based Eternal Memory System with Topological Self-Organization and Dream-Driven Emergence
description: TetraMem-XL is a pure geometric AI memory system using tetrahedral (3-simplex) structures. Memory is stored on tetrahedra in a dynamic simplicial complex, with all retrieval and association via topological BFS (zero vector embeddings). The system enforces four core principles: Eternity (no deletion/decay), Integration (abstract reorganization), Self-Emergence (dream cycles), and Closed-Loop Cognition. Features include 7-dimensional fusion quality scoring, DreamProtocol (THINK-EXECUTE-REFLECT), DreamStore with provenance tracking, and Ghost Cell v2 for distributed consistency.
